gigapan.description:
This is believed to be Sonoma County's oldest surviving farm building still in its'  original rural setting.

The new offices of the Laguna de Santa Rosa Foundation.  Part of the in progress Laguna Learning Center.

http://www.lagunadesantarosa.org

The Laguna de Santa Rosa is the second largest freshwater wetland in California, and is designated a wetland of international significance.

(This image has some artifacts, which I can clean up later)
